name: Easy - Travel diary, volume 1
description: Travel diary, volume 1 If you're lookin' for a good spot to camp out, I'd recommend an old road that winds through the canyons, a path not often taken by folks. Follow it down a ways 'til you come across a small hidin' spot that's just perfect for a cozy fire. If you're feelin' a mite curious, you can dig up the sand and find my trusty ol' box, filled with all sorts of handy supplies.
image: images/Travel diary, volume 1.png

name: Easy - Travel diary, volume 2
description: Travel diary, volume 2 I done seen the craziest thing the other day! I was makin' my way through them snow beds, when I came across a cactus just a-sittin' there frozen stiff! Now, I ask ya, who in tarnation would be foolish enough to haul a cactus out to the snow? Sure beats me!
image: images/Travel diary, volume 2.png

name: Easy - To my pardners in business
description: To my pardners in business, Well howdy, if y'all are readin' this, I done gone and stashed the treasure where the lavender glows and blooms with a luscious hue.
image: images/To my pardners in business.png

name: Easy - Don't forget! Beneath the towering
description: Don't forget! Beneath the towering spires of sand that overlooks lost knowledge.
image: images/Don't forget! Beneath the towering.png

name: Easy - Ordained seeker, As the oak casts a shade
description: Ordained seeker, As the oak casts a shade, the blind lady watches in disdain.
image: images/Ordained seeker, As the oak casts a shade.png

name: Easy - Listen close, The crooked ol’ saloon’s got a secret hidin’ in its cellar
description: Listen close, The crooked ol’ saloon’s got a secret hidin’ in its cellar. To find it, you gotta make your way down yonder and follow them ladders. But mind yer step, ‘cause they ain’t too steady. Your reward’s waitin’ for ya at the bottom, so don’t dilly-dally!
image: images/Listen close, The crooked ol’ saloon’s got a secret hidin’ in its cellar.png

name: Easy - To my future self I done stashed my belongings
description: To my future self I done stashed my belongings, ‘bout ten paces back yonder, near that old west-most facin’ felled log what’s perched atop them Pinewood Hills.
image: images/To my future self I done stashed my belongings.png

name: Easy - Sorry 'bout that, pardner. Tough luck ya got caught
description: Sorry 'bout that, pardner. Tough luck ya got caught, but I had no choice but to turn you over to the sheriff. Once ya get yourself free, head on over to where them three cacti overlook yer prison - that's where I buried yer cut.
image: images/Sorry 'bout that, pardner. Tough luck ya got caught.png

name: Easy - A riddle for ye! Watch the trains pass
description: A riddle for ye! Watch the trains pass, listen to their sound. In the Cadaver's Cave is where the treasure be layin', so look around!
image: images/A riddle for ye! Watch the trains pass.png

name: Easy - My associates, Outside the structure
description: My associates, Outside the structure, adorned with cloth, my gift awaits not far off. Tracks diverging, a deer close by, hollowed log signals the supply.
image: images/My associates, Outside the structure.png

name: Easy - Yarrr! Listen up, pardner, to the one who's readin' this
description: Yarrr! Listen up, pardner, to the one who's readin' this, my most prized stash of trinkets can be found on a wee rocky isle.
image: images/Yarrr! Listen up, pardner, to the one who's readin' this.png

name: Easy - To the seeker... In the tunnel where trains
description: To the seeker... In the tunnel where trains pass through the Buffalo Ridge, a treasure fell and now hides, waiting to be discovered by someone wise.
image: images/To the seeker... In the tunnel where trains.png

name: Easy - In the Tribal Forest, a gift
description: In the Tribal Forest, a gift awaits for the keen eye. A hunting tower, overlooking deer, is where it will lie.
image: images/In the Tribal Forest, a gift.png

name: Easy - My spoils are stashed
description: My spoils are stashed under the most grandest of views overlooking the condemned. Ashburn
image: images/My spoils are stashed.png

name: Easy - Take heed, whoever's layin' their eyes on this
description: Take heed, whoever's layin' their eyes on this, my treasure's buried deep on Silver Hill, amongst a patch of glitterin' gold
image: images/Take heed, whoever's layin' their eyes on this.png

name: Easy - Letter to Mr. Michal, I don't know them Callahans all too well
description: Letter to Mr. Michal, I don't know them Callahans all too well, but I hear' that missy Delores with her inheritance, she gone n' given a portion to an old childhood friend. That friend met an untimely end before they could collect. However, I happened to hear it was buried 'underneath the biggest water trough in the land', whatever that means... Delores'
image: images/Letter to Mr. Michal, I don't know them Callahans all too well.png

name: Easy - Dig by the banks full of silver
description: Dig by the banks full of silver, a massive reward remains to be found. Tribal
image: images/Dig by the banks full of silver.png

name: Easy - One, two, three, a bear lies within me
description: One, two, three, a bear lies within me. Head north, you will see.
image: images/One, two, three, a bear lies within me.png

name: Easy - For sally, Spot the odd one out in town
description: For sally, Spot the odd one out in town, my gear's tucked safe 'neath a tarp, underground. Bronze
image: images/For sally, Spot the odd one out in.png

name: Easy - Heehee! A riddle for thee
description: Heehee! A riddle for thee! A barrel, a bottle, and a trough filled full! No feed for the horses' athirst... but a chest! Waitin' for yee!
image: images/Heehee! A riddle for thee.png

name: Easy - Me and my pardner was just a-driftin' 'cross the range
description: Me and my pardner was just a-driftin' 'cross the range when we happened on this pretty little bridge. We forded that there crick and chowed down on some fine grub under a shady ol' tree. If I ever get my hands on enough coin, I'm aimin' to buy this patch and raise a home here. 'Til that day comes, I reckon I'll mark the spot with this here box.
image: images/Me and my pardner was just a-driftin' 'cross the range.png

name: Easy - Dig by the banks full of silver
description: Dig by the banks full of silver, a massive reward remains to be found. Tribal
image: images/Dig by the banks full of silver.png

name: Medium - Don't forget! Yellow vase with minecarts near,
description: Don't forget! Yellow vase with minecarts near, treasure lying beneath here.
image: images/Don't forget! Yellow vase with minecarts near.png

name: Medium - Pardner, yeah, you! Reckon my boss
description: Pardner, yeah, you! Reckon my boss ain't never gonna give me a moment's peace if'n I don't finish scrubbin' these dishes afore sundown. Mind headin' to my break spot next to the back door and grabbing my stuff for me? Suppose I'll even let 'cha keep some of it.
image: images/Pardner, yeah, you! Reckon my boss.png

name: Medium - The babble of a brook
description: The babble of a brook, the roar of a bear, the ferns south of source, my prize will be there.
image: images/The babble of a brook.png

name: Medium - My esteemed beneficiary
description: My esteemed beneficiary, Ye shall find my loot where she departs into the open blue, in the port of gold by the sign where the first palm tree sways. Puerto
image: images/My esteemed beneficiary.png

name: Medium - The snow capped peak
description: The snow capped peak, so high and grand, holds a treasure within its icy land.
image: images/The snow capped peak.png

name: Medium - I leave my riddle
description: The snow capped peak, so high and grand, holds a treasure within its icy land.
image: images/I leave my riddle.png

name: Medium - To find the thing you yearn
description: To find the thing you yearn, go to her resting stern.
image: images/To find the thing you yearn.png

name: Medium - In a pile of dirt near a grave
description: In a pile of dirt near a grave of a legendary gunslinger, lies the hurt within my soul
image: images/In a pile of dirt near a grave.png

name: Medium - I once overheard a feller say
description: I once overheard a feller say I reckon I ain’t the sharpshootin’ gunslinger I once was, so I figured I’d hide my stash under an odd-lookin’ arrangement o’ rocks. The Great
image: images/I once overheard a feller say.png

name: Medium - From the diary of Gretchen Abbott
description: From the diary of Gretchen Abbott, Splendors forgotten, an ancient warrior stands guard. Near pillars proud, the treasure rests atop the mound.
image: images/From the diary of Gretchen Abbott.png

name: Medium - To whom who reads this note
description: To whom who reads this note, Standing atop copper, a scenic overlook of our bronze town is where your treasure can be found.
image: images/To whom who reads this note.png

name: Medium - Mortals be weary...
description: Mortals be weary... Where the flames of hell burn bright, a gate stands to guard what's in sight, the treasure waits for you to see, so hurry! Ancient
image: images/Mortals be weary.png

name: Medium - My journal, page 93.
description: My journal, page 93. Well, if y'all are readin' this, somethin' must've gone mighty wrong. But shoot, that's just the way the tumbleweed rolls! For those luckier than I, heed this: I buried my prized treasure under a peak of bronze found near a mighty still' green water.
image: images/My journal, page 93.png

name: Medium - Gather round, for a tale I leave
description: Gather round, for a tale I leave In a vast expanse of a sandy land, The knowledge you seek is close at hand, Buried deep within that sea, Are secrets and treasures, yet to be seen, And if you look to the tower not so tall, You might just find what you need most of all.
image: images/Gather round, for a tale I leave.png

name: Medium - Come to the ol' basement locked up tight
description: Come to the ol' basement locked up tight. Twenty pace north should set you right. Ten to the west, to the rock you should go. Ten more to north near loud and great flow.
image: images/Come to the ol' basement locked up tight.png

name: Medium - Tell none other!
description: Tell none other! Near the bridge to clay room low, Are secrets hidden long ago.
image: images/Tell none other.png

name: Medium - From Puerto Dorado I set off to head north
description: From Puerto Dorado I set off to head north adventurin'. Along the way, I crossed paths with a band of outlaws intent on takin' what I had. I lit out quick and stumbled onto a land split by the Good Lord himself. In my haste, I shoved my gear under a log as a roar echoed nearby. Retrace my steps and fetch my stash for me, would ya?
image: images/From Puerto Dorado I set off to head north.png

name: Hard - Betwixt ores of fortune
description: Betwixt ores of fortune, I can predict your fate, pardner. You're headed for a fall, be it to glory or the bitter end, your reward is waitin' for ya' at the bottom of a steep descent.
image: images/Betwixt ores of fortune.png

name: Hard - Do-gooders read
description: Do-gooders read, Underneath the proud and lonesome oak, Atop the rock that destiny broke, There you shall find the prize of which I spoke. The Great
image: images/Do-gooders read.png

name: Hard - For those
description: For those of the utmost faith, Hidden in a patch of clay, South of the Lord’s temple where one might pray. Embraced by marble, there my treasure will stay.
image: images/For those.png

name: Hard - For a hero, From a path of justice
description: For a hero, From a path of justice, guarded by an old warrior’s favored stone, and the love of mum’, my belongings lay down to rest.
image: images/For a hero, From a path of justice.png

name: Hard - Gunslinger whom bested me
description: Gunslinger whom bested me, My treasure’s kept atop an arch of gold, A sight to see, a wonder to behold, But heed my warning, for those who rush, May find themselves tumbling headfirst into a bush.
image: images/Gunslinger whom bested me.png

name: Hard - Heed my words
description: Heed my words: Reckon I'm restin' where the sun don't shine, on top o' a moonlit lake far from the sky. If y'all aim to recover my mighty treasure, then y'alls best be fixin' to take a long dive.
image: images/Heed my words.png

name: Hard - For Peety, Near he who creates a small lake
description: For Peety, Near he who creates a small lake, I done hid my treasure in stolen land for heaven's sake. For months, his roar kept me wide awake, but my belongings remain unscathed beneath golden leaves, make no mistake.
image: images/For Peety, Near he who creates a small lake.png

name: Hard - My dearest, Near the land of old
description: My dearest, Near the land of old, my secrets lie untold. As La Grande passes, listen to its mighty roar. Hidden beneath an aurum road, my treasure waits for the daring one to behold.
image: images/My dearest, Near the land of old.png

name: Hard - Pardner, In scorching heat
description: Pardner, In scorching heat, where toiling's a must, I hid my box near pulleys and rope, in trust, That it helps you escape, in times unjust.
image: images/Pardner, In scorching heat.png

name: Hard - Near the ol' forge lies a bituminous heap
description: Near the ol' forge lies a bituminous heap. Within the dust, a prize you may reap.
image: images/Near the ol' forge lies a bituminous heap.png

name: Hard - Spirit of the West
description: Spirit of the West, run wild! Where the giant's tears run quite stark, I dwell where they furcate, hark!
image: images/Spirit of the West.png
